testing_centers.notes: Exam included with training. Taken online through Scaled Agile portal after attending training.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match registration.
exam_rules: Closed-book. Online proctored. Exam is included with SAFe training course attendance. Must complete exam within 30 days of training.
renewal_options: SAFe certifications expire annually. Renew by attending training, taking a renewal exam ($50 USD), or earning required Community of Practice credits.
target_audience: Executive Leaders, Enterprise Architects, Product Management Leaders, PMO Leaders, Agile Coaches, SAFe Practice Consultants

retake_policy.notes: First retake included free. Subsequent retakes $50 USD each. Must complete within 30 days of training.

objectives.title: Learn how to connect portfolio initiatives directly to business strategy and keep investments focused on the most important outcomes.
Explore how to fund value streams, establish guardrails, and manage epics using portfolio kanban to support continuous, lean flow.
Gain practical tools for coordinating across value streams, managing change, and supporting excellence through agile PMOs and communities of practice.

domains.name: Designing a Plan for LPM Adoption

objectives.title: Capture your current state, define your portfolio vision, and build a step-by-step plan to bring Lean Portfolio Management to life in your organization.

official_study_resources.title: Scaled Agile Training
official_study_resources.notes: All SAFe certifications require attending official SAFe training
